channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: MSI Prestige 14 Flip AI+ Review: A Solid 2-in-1 Laptop With Some Glaring Flaws
item.description: It's the cheapest way to access Intel's exciting new CPUs. You'll just have to deal with a few pain points.

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is a great time to get a fancy, AI-powered bird feeder
item.description: Bird feeders have come a long way since their inception in the early 1900s. These days, it’s not all that surprising to see feeders kitted out with cameras and solar roofs, two marquee features you’ll find on feeders from both BirdBuddy and Netvue. And while modern hoppers can command a pretty penny, Amazon’s Big Spring […]

item.title: Bridgerton season 5: everything we know about the Netflix show's return
item.description: Season 4 might have only just finished, but we already know whose love story is next. Here's everything we know so far about Bridgerton season 5 on Netflix.

item.title: The Macintosh changed computers forever
item.description: Apple's most legendary computer has two legacies: there's the computer itself, and there's the commercial. That commercial. Only a couple of days before Steve Jobs debuted the computer that would both help cement his legacy and contribute to his unceremonious exile from Apple, the company dropped a Super Bowl ad that is still one of […]

item.title: 'Every living thing on Earth runs on the same programming language': How AI foundation models trained on DNA could transform plant biology
item.description: How AI foundation models are moving from language into the biology of living systems and plant science.

item.title: Apple’s long, bitter App Store antitrust war
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the legal travails of Big Tech, follow Adi Robertson. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started The year was 1998, and reigning personal computer […]

item.title: This new tech could help prevent future runway crashes
item.description: Honeywell’s new software gives pilots real-time warnings about runway dangers—and could be approved this year. On a foggy winter day at Austin’s airport three years ago, a FedEx cargo plane nearly crashed into a Southwest Airlines jet full of passengers after both were cleared to use the same runway. At the last moment, as the FedEx plane was landing, the pilot saw the outline of the other plane’s wing and pulled up, narrowly avoiding the disaster. An air traffic controller couldn’t see that the Southwest plane was sitting on the runway because of the heavy fog....

item.title: Test du Nothing Headphone (a) : autonomie de légende et audio au top
item.description: Nothing revient avec un deuxième casque Bluetooth. Le Headphone (a) reprend l'essentiel du Headphone (1), le tuning acoustique de KEF en moins. Design semi-transparent, commandes physiques, transducteurs 40 mm à membrane titane. L'ambition est claire : le meilleur rapport qualité/prix du segment à moins de 200 euros.

item.title: This older MacBook Air M4 with 512GB storage just dropped to a new record-low price
item.description: The juiciest Apple MacBook Air M4 deal of the season

item.title: Amazon brade déjà le récent TV 4K QD-Mini LED 75 pouces de Xiaomi, tournant sous Google TV
item.description: Xiaomi lance de nouveaux TV avec des tarifs agressifs : on a donc un écran 4K QD‑Mini LED, une compatibilité HDR et Google TV, le tout pour 949 euros pour le modèle 75 pouces au lieu de 999 euros de base.
